meta.title: Gobbly — Restaurant Management, Simplified
meta.description: All-in-one restaurant management platform. POS, kitchen display, digital menus, QR ordering, and smart payments — in a single app.
meta.schemaDescription: All-in-one restaurant management platform. POS, kitchen display, digital menus, QR ordering, and smart payments.

hero.subtitle: Ditch the paper tickets and scattered tools. Gobbly brings your POS, kitchen, menu, and payments into a single, real-time platform.

cards.title: No more paper tickets
cards.description: Orders go straight from the table to the kitchen screen. No handwriting, no lost tickets, no miscommunication.

cards.title: Real-time kitchen sync
cards.description: Kitchen staff see orders the moment they're placed. Status updates flow back instantly — pending, cooking, ready, delivered.

cards.title: Customers pay their way
cards.description: Diners scan the QR, pick what they ate, and split the bill however they like. Cash, card, or mixed — done in seconds.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything your restaurant needs
features.description: From the front of house to the kitchen, Gobbly covers every touchpoint in your restaurant operation.

items.title: Point of Sale
items.description: Intuitive POS with table management, category browsing, and instant order creation. Simple mode for quick service, advanced mode for fine dining.

items.title: Kitchen Display
items.description: Tablet-optimized screen for the kitchen. Orders appear in real-time with clickable status badges. Touch-friendly design built for busy kitchens.

items.title: Digital Menu & QR
items.description: Customers scan a QR code at their table to browse your full menu, see allergens, and place orders directly. Daily menus update automatically.

items.title: Smart Payments
items.description: Flexible bill splitting — by item, equal shares, or custom amounts. Supports cash, card, and mixed payments with VeriFactu-compliant invoicing.

steps.title: Set up your menu
steps.description: Add your dishes, categories, allergens, and daily specials. Import from a spreadsheet or build from scratch.

steps.title: Generate table QR codes
steps.description: Print unique QR codes for each table. Customers scan to view the menu and place orders from their phone.

steps.title: Manage orders in real-time
steps.description: Watch orders flow from table to kitchen to plate. Track every dish, manage payments, and close tables with a tap.

items.quote: “We cut order errors by 80% the first week. The kitchen display alone saved us from constant miscommunication during rush hours.”
items.name: Marta Pérez

items.quote: “Our customers love the QR ordering. They scan, browse the menu with allergen info, and pay — all without waiting for a waiter. Tips went up 15%.”
items.name: Joan Lluís

items.quote: “Setting up took 20 minutes. The VeriFactu invoicing was the killer feature for us — no more juggling a separate billing system.”
items.name: Ana García

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees, no contracts.

cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of restaurants already using Gobbly to streamline their operations and delight their guests.

footer.tagline: All-in-one restaurant management. From the kitchen to the table, simplified.

about.title: About Gobbly
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to simplify restaurant management for everyone — from neighborhood bistros to multi-location groups.
about.missionText: We believe restaurant owners should spend their time doing what they love — creating unforgettable dining experiences — not wrestling with disconnected tools and paper-based processes. Gobbly was born from that conviction: a single, intuitive platform that connects every part of your restaurant in real time.

founders.name: Marc Solé
founders.bio: Former restaurant manager turned tech entrepreneur. After years of dealing with fragmented tools and paper tickets, Marc set out to build the all-in-one platform he wished he'd had. He leads product vision and strategy, working closely with restaurant owners across Spain to ensure Gobbly stays true to the realities of daily service.

founders.name: Elena Vidal
founders.bio: Full-stack engineer with a decade of experience building real-time systems. Elena architects Gobbly's infrastructure — from the kitchen display sync to the payment processing pipeline — ensuring everything just works. Before Gobbly, she led engineering teams at two Barcelona-based SaaS startups, shipping products used by thousands of businesses daily.

founders.name: Pau Ribera
founders.bio: Operations specialist with a background in hospitality consulting. Pau works directly with restaurant partners to shape the product roadmap and ensure Gobbly solves real problems for real kitchens. His hands-on approach means he regularly spends time in partner restaurants, observing workflows and gathering feedback firsthand.

story.title: Our Story
paragraphs: Gobbly was born in Barcelona in 2024, out of a shared frustration that every restaurant owner knows too well: the daily juggling act between a point-of-sale system that doesn't talk to the kitchen, a paper ticket workflow that falls apart during rush hour, and a stack of disconnected tools that were never designed to work together.

Our founding team brings together deep restaurant industry experience and modern engineering expertise. Marc spent over a decade managing restaurants and knew exactly where the pain points were. Elena had spent years building real-time collaborative software and saw that the same technology powering modern workplaces could transform hospitality. Pau, with his background in operations consulting, understood how to bridge the gap between what technology can do and what restaurant teams actually need.

Together, we set out with a clear mission: make technology serve hospitality, not the other way around. We wanted to build a platform that a restaurant owner could set up in minutes, that kitchen staff would actually enjoy using, and that diners would find seamless. Today, Gobbly is used by restaurants across Spain and beyond, and we're just getting started.

items.title: Simplicity
items.description: Technology should simplify, not complicate. Every feature we ship must pass a simple test: does it make a restaurant owner's day easier?

items.title: Real-time
items.description: Restaurants move fast, and your tools should too. From order placement to kitchen display to payment, everything happens in real time — no refreshing, no delays.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: No hidden fees, no lock-in contracts. You can see our pricing, export your data anytime, and cancel whenever you want. We earn your trust every month.

items.title: Local
items.description: Built in Barcelona, for restaurants everywhere. We understand the Mediterranean hospitality culture, and we design with the warmth and pace of real service in mind.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, want a demo, or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your restaurant and how we can help...
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn how Gobbly collects, uses, and protects your personal data. GDPR compliant.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, use our services, or contact us. This includes your name, email address, restaurant name, and payment information. We also automatically collect usage data such as device information, IP address, and how you interact with the platform.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services; process transactions and send related information; send you technical notices, updates, and support messages; respond to your comments and questions; and monitor and analyze trends and usage.

sections.heading: 3. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing (Stripe), email delivery, and cloud hosting. These providers are bound by contractual obligations to keep your information confidential.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies & Tracking
sections.content: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences. We also use analytics cookies to understand how our platform is used. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Our platform does not respond to Do Not Track signals.

sections.heading: 5. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Payment data is processed by PCI DSS-compliant providers and never stored on our servers. We conduct regular security audits and maintain strict access controls.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.content: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data; object to or restrict processing; data portability; and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at gobbly.app@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.heading: 7. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. If you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your data within 90 days, except where we are required to retain it for legal or regulatory purposes.

sections.heading: 8. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at gobbly.app@gmail.com or write to us at Gobbly SL, Barcelona, Spain.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Read the terms and conditions for using Gobbly restaurant management platform.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the Gobbly platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use the platform. These terms apply to all users, including restaurant owners, staff members, and end customers using QR ordering.

sections.heading: 2. Service Description
sections.content: Gobbly provides a cloud-based restaurant management platform including point of sale (POS), kitchen display system, digital menus with QR ordering, and payment processing. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service with reasonable notice.

sections.heading: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account and keep it up to date. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

sections.heading: 4. Payments & Billing
sections.content: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually in advance. Prices are in euros and exclude applicable taxes. We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days' notice. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. Free tier usage is subject to the limits described on our pricing page.

sections.heading: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree not to use the platform for any unlawful purpose, to interfere with or disrupt the service, to attempt unauthorized access, or to transmit malicious code. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

sections.heading: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The Gobbly platform, including its software, design, logos, and content, is the property of Gobbly SL and is protected by intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of your restaurant data. By using the platform, you grant us a limited license to process your data solely to provide the service.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Gobbly shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

sections.heading: 8. Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. You can cancel your account from the settings page. Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately. We will retain your data for 90 days after termination, after which it will be permanently deleted.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Spain. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Barcelona, Spain.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at gobbly.app@gmail.com or write to Gobbly SL, Barcelona, Spain.

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.description: Intuitive POS system designed for restaurants. Table management, quick search, and instant order creation.
pos.heroTitle: A POS built for restaurants, not retail
pos.heroSubtitle: Forget clunky legacy systems. Gobbly's POS runs on any tablet, sets up in minutes, and handles everything from table management to split bills.

problems.title: Slow & outdated hardware
problems.description: Bulky terminals that crash during rush hour and cost thousands to replace.

problems.title: Expensive licensing fees
problems.description: Monthly fees that keep rising, with charges for every terminal and every update.

problems.title: Complicated setup
problems.description: Weeks of installation and training before your staff can take a single order.

pos.highlightsTitle: Everything you need at the point of sale

highlights.title: Table grid management
highlights.description: Visual floor plan with real-time status for every table — free, occupied, waiting for bill.

highlights.title: Quick item search
highlights.description: Find any dish instantly with smart search across categories, names, and custom tags.

highlights.title: Custom modifiers
highlights.description: Add extras, remove ingredients, or note special requests with a single tap.

highlights.title: Discounts & promotions
highlights.description: Apply percentage or fixed discounts per item or per table. Set up happy hour rules automatically.

highlights.title: Split orders
highlights.description: Move items between seats, split courses for the kitchen, and manage group dining effortlessly.

highlights.title: Offline mode
highlights.description: Keep taking orders even when the internet drops. Everything syncs automatically when you're back online.

pos.stepsTitle: Up and running in three steps

steps.title: Set up your menu
steps.description: Import your dishes, set categories, prices, and modifiers. Done in minutes.

steps.title: Assign your tables
steps.description: Drag and drop tables on the visual floor plan to match your restaurant layout.

steps.title: Start taking orders
steps.description: Tap a table, add items, send to the kitchen. Your staff will learn it in one shift.

benefits.description: Faster order entry compared to legacy POS systems
Average setup time from zero to first order
Works on iPad, Android, or any device with a browser
Uptime with offline mode as your safety net

pos.exploreSubtitle: Gobbly connects every part of your restaurant.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Display
kitchen.description: Real-time kitchen display system. See orders instantly, track status, and eliminate paper tickets.
kitchen.heroTitle: A kitchen screen that keeps up with your chefs
kitchen.heroSubtitle: No more paper tickets getting lost, smudged, or piling up. Every order appears on screen the moment it's placed, with clear priorities and status tracking.

problems.title: Tickets get lost or smudged
problems.description: Paper tickets fall off the rail, get wet, or become unreadable during the busiest hours.

problems.title: No order priority
problems.description: Without a clear queue, the kitchen guesses which orders came first and which tables are waiting longest.

problems.title: Zero visibility for the floor
problems.description: Waiters have no idea what's cooking, what's ready, or how long a table has been waiting.

kitchen.highlightsTitle: A command center for your kitchen

highlights.title: Real-time order feed
highlights.description: Orders appear instantly as they're placed from the POS or QR menu. No delays, no middleman.

highlights.title: Priority sorting
highlights.description: Automatic queue based on order time. Oldest orders always visible at the top.

highlights.title: Status badges
highlights.description: Tap to move orders through Pending, Cooking, and Ready. The whole team sees the current state.

highlights.title: Timer alerts
highlights.description: Visual warnings when orders exceed target prep time. Never let a table wait too long.

highlights.title: Multi-station support
highlights.description: Split the display by station — grill, fryer, desserts — so each cook sees only what matters.

highlights.title: Touch-friendly design
highlights.description: Large buttons, high contrast, and swipe gestures designed for greasy fingers and fast-paced kitchens.

kitchen.stepsTitle: From table to kitchen in seconds

steps.title: Order placed
steps.description: A waiter enters the order on the POS, or a customer orders via QR. It arrives instantly.

steps.title: Appears on screen
steps.description: The order shows up on the kitchen display with all items, modifiers, and table number.

steps.title: Mark as ready
steps.description: The chef taps 'Ready' and the waiter is notified. The dish goes out while it's hot.

benefits.description: Fewer order errors in the first week
Paper waste from printed kitchen tickets
Visibility for floor staff on order status

kitchen.exploreSubtitle: Gobbly connects every part of your restaurant.

qrMenu.title: Digital Menu & QR Ordering
qrMenu.description: Interactive QR menus with photos, allergens, and direct ordering. Update instantly, print nothing.
qrMenu.heroTitle: Your menu, always up to date, always in their hands
qrMenu.heroSubtitle: Customers scan a QR code at their table and get your full menu with photos, allergen info, and the ability to order directly. No app download required.

problems.title: Expensive to update
problems.description: Every price change or seasonal dish means reprinting hundreds of menus. Money and time wasted.

problems.title: No allergen transparency
problems.description: Printed menus rarely show complete allergen info. One mistake can have serious consequences.

problems.title: Slow ordering process
problems.description: Customers wait for a waiter to bring the menu, then wait again to place their order.

qrMenu.highlightsTitle: A digital menu that does more than display

highlights.title: QR code per table
highlights.description: Each table gets a unique QR code. Customers scan with their phone camera — no app needed.

highlights.title: Interactive menu
highlights.description: High-quality photos, detailed descriptions, and full allergen information for every dish.

highlights.title: Direct ordering
highlights.description: Customers add items to their order and send it straight to the kitchen. No waiter needed.

highlights.title: Real-time availability
highlights.description: 86'd a dish? Mark it as unavailable and it disappears from the menu instantly.

highlights.title: Multi-language support
highlights.description: Your menu automatically displays in the customer's preferred language. Perfect for tourist areas.

highlights.title: Customizable design
highlights.description: Match the menu's look and feel to your restaurant's brand. Colors, fonts, and layout are all yours.

qrMenu.stepsTitle: Three steps to a paperless menu

steps.title: Upload your menu
steps.description: Add dishes with photos, prices, allergens, and categories. Import from a spreadsheet or build it visually.

steps.title: Print QR codes
steps.description: Generate unique QR codes for each table. Print them on table tents, stickers, or placemats.

steps.title: Customers scan & order
steps.description: Diners scan the code, browse the menu, and place their order. It goes straight to the kitchen.

benefits.description: Menu updates — no reprinting, no downtime
Languages supported out of the box

qrMenu.exploreSubtitle: Gobbly connects every part of your restaurant.

payments.title: Smart Payments
payments.description: Flexible bill splitting, mixed payments, and VeriFactu-compliant invoicing. Close tables in seconds.
payments.heroTitle: Payments that match how people actually pay
payments.heroSubtitle: Split bills by item, by person, or by custom amount. Accept cash, card, or both. Generate legally compliant invoices automatically.
payments.problemsTitle: Checkout shouldn't be the worst part

problems.title: Awkward bill splitting
problems.description: Manually calculating who had what turns checkout into a slow, frustrating experience for everyone.

problems.title: Manual invoicing
problems.description: Writing invoices by hand or switching to a separate billing system wastes time and introduces errors.

problems.title: Slow cash register closing
problems.description: Counting cash, reconciling card payments, and generating daily reports takes ages at the end of every shift.

highlights.title: Smart bill splitting
highlights.description: Split by item (each person picks what they ordered), equal shares, or custom amounts. Three taps, done.

highlights.title: Cash, card, or mixed
highlights.description: Accept any combination of payment methods on the same bill. No workarounds needed.

highlights.title: VeriFactu-compliant invoicing
highlights.description: Generate legally valid invoices automatically. Fully compliant with Spain's VeriFactu regulation.

highlights.title: Digital tips
highlights.description: Customers can add a tip during digital payment. Suggested amounts make tipping easy and natural.

highlights.title: Automated cash register closing
highlights.description: One-tap shift close with automatic cash count, card reconciliation, and daily summary report.

payments.stepsTitle: From bill to paid in seconds

steps.title: Customer requests the bill
steps.description: The waiter opens the table on the POS, or the customer taps 'Pay' on the QR menu.

steps.title: Choose how to split
steps.description: Pick a split method: by item, equal shares, or custom amount. Preview before confirming.

steps.title: Pay & get the invoice
steps.description: Process the payment, generate the invoice instantly, and close the table. Done.

benefits.description: Faster checkout compared to manual billing
More tips with the digital tipping option

payments.exploreSubtitle: Gobbly connects every part of your restaurant.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.description: Simple, transparent pricing for restaurants of every size. Start free and scale as you grow.
pricingPage.heroSubtitle: No hidden fees, no surprises. Pick the plan that fits your restaurant and upgrade anytime as you grow.
pricingPage.proSubtitle: For growing restaurants that need more power
pricingPage.comparisonSubtitle: See exactly what's included in each plan.
pricingPage.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing.

faq.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
faq.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to the new features. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the end of your current billing cycle.

faq.question: Is there a contract or commitment?
faq.answer: No. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. You can cancel at any time. Enterprise plans may include custom terms depending on your needs.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) as well as SEPA direct debit for European customers. All payments are securely processed through Stripe.

faq.question: Is there a free trial for the Pro plan?
faq.answer: Yes. You get a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan with full access to all features. No credit card required to start. At the end of the trial, you can choose to subscribe or switch to the free Starter plan.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed the Starter plan limits?
faq.answer: If you need more than 10 tables, you'll be prompted to upgrade to the Pro plan. We'll never cut off your service unexpectedly — you'll receive a notification with plenty of time to decide.

faq.question: Do you offer discounts for annual billing?
faq.answer: Yes. Annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly billing. That means the Pro plan comes to just €39/month when billed annually.

pricingPage.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of restaurants already using Gobbly. Start free, no credit card required.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.description: Find answers about Gobbly restaurant management platform — features, pricing, setup, compliance, and more.
faqPage.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Gobbly. Can't find your answer? Get in touch with our team.

items.question: What is Gobbly?
items.answer: Gobbly is an all-in-one restaurant management platform that combines POS, kitchen display, digital menus with QR ordering, and smart payments into a single real-time app. It replaces paper tickets and scattered tools with one unified system.

items.question: Who is Gobbly for?
items.answer: Gobbly is designed for any food-service business — from small neighborhood bistros and cafes to multi-location restaurant groups. Whether you run a quick-service spot or a fine-dining establishment, Gobbly adapts to your workflow.

items.question: How is Gobbly different from other restaurant management tools?
items.answer: Unlike traditional solutions that require multiple disconnected systems, Gobbly integrates POS, kitchen management, digital menus, and payments in one platform. Everything syncs in real time, so your front-of-house and kitchen are always on the same page.

items.question: Is Gobbly available in my language?
items.answer: Gobbly is currently available in English, Spanish, and Catalan. We are actively working on adding more languages. Your customer-facing digital menu can be displayed in multiple languages simultaneously.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes. Our Starter plan is completely free and includes up to 10 tables, POS, kitchen display, QR menu and ordering, and basic analytics. No credit card required to get started.

items.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. When upgrading, you get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, changes take effect at the end of your billing cycle.

items.question: Is there a contract or commitment?
items.answer: No long-term contracts. All paid plans are billed monthly, and you can cancel at any time. We believe in earning your business every month, not locking you in.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) through our secure payment processor, Stripe. For Enterprise plans, we also offer bank transfer and custom invoicing.

items.question: Does Gobbly work offline?
items.answer: Gobbly is designed as an online-first platform for real-time synchronization. However, core POS functions continue to work during brief connectivity interruptions, and data syncs automatically once the connection is restored.

items.question: Can customers order from their phone?
items.answer: Yes. Customers scan a QR code at their table to browse your full menu, view allergen information, and place orders directly from their phone. No app download required — it works in any mobile browser.

items.question: Does it support bill splitting?
items.answer: Yes. Gobbly offers flexible bill splitting — customers can split by item, equal shares, or custom amounts. It supports cash, card, and mixed payments all in one transaction.

items.question: Can I customize my digital menu?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can organize dishes into categories, add photos and allergen information, set daily specials, and manage availability in real time. Changes are reflected instantly on the customer-facing QR menu.

items.question: What devices does Gobbly work on?
items.answer: Gobbly runs in any modern web browser — Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge — on tablets, laptops, and desktops. The kitchen display is optimized for tablet use, while the POS works great on any screen size.

items.question: Do I need special hardware?
items.answer: No special hardware is required. Gobbly works on the devices you already have — any tablet, laptop, or computer with a web browser. For printing, it supports standard thermal receipt printers via the browser.

items.question: How do I set up Gobbly?
items.answer: Setup takes about 20 minutes. Create your account, add your menu items (or import from a spreadsheet), print QR codes for your tables, and you are ready to go. Our onboarding guide walks you through every step.

items.question: Is Gobbly VeriFactu compliant?
items.answer: Yes. Gobbly's Pro and Enterprise plans include VeriFactu-compliant invoicing out of the box. All invoices meet Spanish electronic invoicing regulations, so you stay compliant without any extra effort.

items.question: How does Gobbly handle my data (GDPR)?
items.answer: Gobbly is fully GDPR compliant. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest, stored on EU-based servers, and never sold to third parties. You can export or delete your data at any time from your account settings.

items.question: Does Gobbly generate legal invoices?
items.answer: Yes. Gobbly generates legally valid invoices that comply with Spanish tax regulations. Pro and Enterprise plans include VeriFactu-compliant electronic invoicing, and all invoices can be downloaded or emailed directly to customers.

faqPage.ctaText: Our team is here to help. Reach out and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
